## `luna.scene` {#scene}

> Registers the `luna.scene.*` scene stack, registry, data store, and depth-sorter API.
>
> The scene stack manages a LIFO stack of Lua scene tables with optional
> visual transitions. Scene tables are stored via `mlua::RegistryKey` and
> identified by `SceneId`. Inter-scene data is stored similarly.

```lua
luna.scene.clear()  -- Clears the state
luna.scene.draw()  -- Draw
luna.scene.getCurrent() -> any  -- Returns the current
luna.scene.getData( key : string ) -> any  -- Returns the data
luna.scene.getRegistered( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the registered
luna.scene.getRegisteredNames() -> any  -- Returns the registered names
luna.scene.getStackSize() -> any  -- Returns the stack size
luna.scene.getTransitionProgress() -> any  -- Returns the transition progress
luna.scene.hasData( key : string ) -> any  -- Returns true if data
luna.scene.hasRegistered( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns true if registered
luna.scene.isEmpty() -> boolean  -- Returns true if empty
luna.scene.isTransitioning() -> any  -- Returns true if transitioning
luna.scene.newDepthSorter() -> any  -- New depth sorter
luna.scene.pop( transition : string?, duration : number? )  -- Removes an item
luna.scene.popTo( name : string ) -> boolean  -- Removes to
luna.scene.push( scene : table, transition : string?, duration : number? )  -- Adds an item
luna.scene.registerScene( name : string, scene : table )  -- Register scene
luna.scene.removeData( key : string )  -- Removes data
luna.scene.setData( key : string, value : any )  -- Sets the data
luna.scene.switchTo( scene : table, transition : string?, duration : number? )  -- Switch to
luna.scene.unregisterScene( name : string )  -- Unregister scene
luna.scene.update( dt : number )  -- Update
```

### `DepthSorter`

```lua
DepthSorter:add( callback : function, depth : number )  -- Registers a draw callback at the given depth layer. Higher `depth` values draw in front
DepthSorter:addObject( obj : table )  -- Registers a table object with a `draw` method at the given depth
DepthSorter:clear()  -- Removes all registered callbacks and objects without calling them
DepthSorter:flush()  -- Calls all registered draw callbacks and object `draw()` methods in sorted depth order, then clears the list
DepthSorter:getCount() -> any  -- Returns the number of callbacks and objects currently registered
DepthSorter:sort()  -- Sorts all registered callbacks and objects by their depth values (ascending)
```

---

```lua
luna.pathfinding.newPathGrid( w : integer, h : integer, cell_size : number ) -> any  -- Pathfinding on this FlowField
```

## `luna.postfx` {#postfx}

> Lua API bindings for the `luna.postfx.*` post-processing effects module.
>
> Registers the `luna.postfx` table and exposes three factory functions:

```lua
luna.postfx.getEffectTypes() -> table<string>  -- Returns a Lua table listing all valid built-in effect type names
luna.postfx.newEffect( name : string ) -> PostFxEffect  -- Creates a built-in post-processing effect by name
luna.postfx.newPass( shader_id : integer ) -> PostFxEffect  -- Creates a custom shader pass effect
luna.postfx.newStack( w : integer?, h : integer? ) -> PostFxStack  -- Creates an empty post-processing stack
```

### `PostFxEffect`

```lua
PostFxEffect:getEffectType() -> string  -- Returns the string name of this effect's type
PostFxEffect:getParameterNames()  -- Returns a sorted list of all parameter names currently set on this effect
PostFxEffect:hasParameter() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if the named parameter exists on this effect
PostFxEffect:isBuiltIn() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if this is a built-in effect (not a custom shader pass)
PostFxEffect:isEnabled() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if this effect is currently enabled
PostFxEffect:setBrightness()  -- Sets the colour grading brightness multiplier
PostFxEffect:setContrast()  -- Sets the colour grading contrast
PostFxEffect:setEnabled()  -- Enables or disables this effect within its parent stack
PostFxEffect:setIntensity()  -- Sets the intensity for bloom or godrays effects
PostFxEffect:setOffset()  -- Sets the chromatic aberration pixel offset
PostFxEffect:setParameter()  -- Sets a named float parameter on the effect
PostFxEffect:setRadius()  -- Sets the Gaussian blur radius
PostFxEffect:setSaturation()  -- Sets the colour grading saturation
PostFxEffect:setScanlineStrength()  -- Sets the CRT scanline strength
PostFxEffect:setStrength()  -- Sets the vignette or blur strength
PostFxEffect:setThreshold()  -- Sets the bloom bright-pass threshold
```

### `PostFxStack`

```lua
PostFxStack:add()  -- Appends a `PostFxEffect` to the end of the stack
PostFxStack:getDimensions()  -- Returns both canvas dimensions as `(width, height)`
PostFxStack:getEffect()  -- Returns the effect at a 1-based position in the chain, or `nil`
PostFxStack:getEffectCount() -> integer  -- Returns the number of effects currently in the chain (enabled and disabled)
PostFxStack:getEnabledEffects()  -- Returns a Lua table of all currently enabled effects in application order
PostFxStack:getHeight() -> integer  -- Returns the canvas height in pixels
PostFxStack:getWidth() -> integer  -- Returns the canvas width in pixels
PostFxStack:isCapturing() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` while the stack is between `beginCapture` and `endCapture`
PostFxStack:isEffectEnabled() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if the given effect is enabled within this stack
PostFxStack:remove() -> boolean  -- Removes a `PostFxEffect` from the stack chain
PostFxStack:resize()  -- Resizes the internal canvas dimensions
```

## `luna.savegame` {#savegame}

> Savegame Api implementation for the `lua_api` subsystem.
>
> This module is part of Luna2D's `lua_api` subsystem and provides the implementation
> details for savegame api-related operations and data management.
> Primary functions: `register()`.

```lua
luna.savegame.newSaveManager()  -- New save manager
```

### `mlua`

```lua
mlua:collect() -> any  -- Snapshots all registered tables into an in-memory serializable form, ready for disk write
mlua:disableAutoSave()  -- Disables automatic periodic saving
mlua:getSchemaVersion() -> any  -- Returns the schema version currently set on this save manager
mlua:getSummary() -> any  -- Returns the summary string set by `setSummary`, or an empty string if none was set
mlua:isDirty() -> any  -- Returns `true` if the save data has been modified since the last write
mlua:markDirty()  -- Marks the save as dirty, ensuring it will be written on the next autosave tick
mlua:reset()  -- Clears all registered tables back to their initial state and marks the save dirty
mlua:restore()  -- Restores all registered tables from a previously collected save data table
mlua:setSchemaVersion( version : integer )  -- Sets the schema version stored in the save file. Increment when save format changes
mlua:setSummary( summary : string )  -- Sets a human-readable summary string stored alongside the save data (e.g. for save-slot UI)
mlua:unregister( name : string )  -- Removes a previously registered save slot by name
mlua:update( dt : number ) -> any  -- Ticks the autosave timer. Must be called from `luna.update(dt)` when autosave is enabled
```

---

## `luna.modding` {#modding}

> Modding Api implementation for the `lua_api` subsystem.
>
> This module is part of Luna2D's `lua_api` subsystem and provides the implementation
> details for modding api-related operations and data management.
> Primary functions: `register()`.

```lua
luna.modding.newMod( info : table ) -> any  -- New mod
luna.modding.newModManager()  -- New mod manager
```

### `mlua`

```lua
mlua:clearLoadOrder()  -- Clear load order on this ModManager
mlua:clearReloadQueue()  -- Clear reload queue on this ModManager
mlua:getAllMods() -> any  -- Returns the all mods
mlua:getAuthor() -> any  -- Returns the author
mlua:getConfig() -> any  -- Returns the config
mlua:getDependencies() -> any  -- Returns the dependencies
mlua:getDescription() -> any  -- Returns the description
mlua:getHook( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the hook
mlua:getHookNames() -> any  -- Returns the hook names
mlua:getId() -> any  -- Returns the id
mlua:getLoadOrder() -> any  -- Returns the load order
mlua:getModCount() -> any  -- Returns the mod count
mlua:getModPath( mod_id : string ) -> any  -- Returns the mod path
mlua:getName() -> any  -- Returns the name
mlua:getPriority() -> any  -- Returns the priority
mlua:getReloadQueue() -> any  -- Returns the reload queue
mlua:getVersion() -> any  -- Returns the version
mlua:hasCircularDependencies() -> any  -- Returns `true` if circular dependencies
mlua:hasHook( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if hook
mlua:hasMod( mod_id : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if mod
mlua:isEnabled() -> any  -- Returns `true` if enabled
mlua:isLoaded() -> any  -- Returns `true` if loaded
mlua:markForReload( mod_id : string ) -> any  -- Mark for reload on this ModManager
mlua:registerMod( ud : Mod )  -- Adds mod to the collection
mlua:releaseRefs()  -- Release refs on this Mod
mlua:scanFolder( path : string ) -> any  -- Scan folder on this ModManager
mlua:setConfig( value : any )  -- Sets the config
mlua:setEnabled( enabled : boolean )  -- Sets the enabled
mlua:setLoadOrder( order_table : table )  -- Sets the load order
mlua:unregisterMod( mod_id : string )  -- Removes mod from the collection
mlua:validateDependencies() -> any  -- Validate dependencies on this ModManager
```

## `luna.localization` {#localization}

> Registers the `luna.localization.*` internationalization API.
>
> Provides a structured translation system supporting multiple languages,
> fallback chains, pluralization, variable interpolation, and language-change
> callbacks.

```lua
luna.localization.getAvailableLanguages() -> any  -- Returns the available languages
luna.localization.getBase() -> any  -- Returns the base
luna.localization.getLanguage() -> any  -- Returns the language
luna.localization.hasLanguage( lang : string ) -> any  -- Returns true if language
luna.localization.loadTable( lang : string, table : table )  -- Load table
luna.localization.offChange( callback : function )  -- Off change
luna.localization.onChange( callback : function )  -- On change
luna.localization.setBase( lang : string )  -- Sets the base
luna.localization.setLanguage( lang : string )  -- Sets the language
luna.localization.t( key : string, vars : table? ) -> any  -- T
```

## `luna.stats` {#stats}

> Lua API bindings for the `luna.stats` RPG character sheet system.
>
> Exposes [`Sheet`] and a global [`StatsRegistry`] as `luna.stats.*` Lua values.

```lua
luna.stats.applyArchetypes( sheet_ud : Sheet, race : string?, class : string? )  -- Apply archetypes
luna.stats.defineClass( name : string, opts : table )  -- Define class
luna.stats.defineRace( name : string, opts : table )  -- Define race
luna.stats.defineTrait( name : string, opts : table )  -- Define trait
luna.stats.getClassNames() -> any  -- Returns the class names
luna.stats.getRaceNames() -> any  -- Returns the race names
luna.stats.getTraitNames() -> any  -- Returns the trait names
luna.stats.newSheet() -> any  -- New sheet
```

### `Sheet`

```lua
Sheet:acquirePerk( name : string )  -- `sheet:acquirePerk(name)` – acquire the perk if level requirement is met
Sheet:addBuff( stat : string, add : number, mul : number, duration : number, source : string? ) -> any  -- `sheet:addBuff(stat, add, mul, duration, source?)` – returns integer handle
Sheet:addTrait( name : string )  -- `sheet:addTrait(name)` – apply a globally-defined trait
Sheet:addXP( amount : number ) -> any  -- `sheet:addXP(amount)` – add XP, auto-levels up. Returns levels gained
Sheet:adjustMorale( delta : number ) -> any  -- `sheet:adjustMorale(delta)` – add delta to current morale (clamped 0..max)
Sheet:beginTurn()  -- `sheet:beginTurn()` – restore action points to max
Sheet:checkMorale() -> any  -- `sheet:checkMorale()` – returns "panic", "berserk", or nil
Sheet:clearBuffs( stat : string? )  -- `sheet:clearBuffs(stat?)` – remove all buffs, or just those for the given stat
Sheet:clearFlag( name : string )  -- `sheet:clearFlag(name)` – clear a flag
Sheet:get( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:get(name)` – get effective value (buffs applied, clamped)
Sheet:getActionPoints() -> any  -- `sheet:getActionPoints()` – returns current, max
Sheet:getActiveTraits() -> table  -- `sheet:getActiveTraits()` – list all active trait names
Sheet:getBase( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:getBase(name)` – get raw base value
Sheet:getBuffCount( stat : string? ) -> any  -- Returns the buff count
Sheet:getBuffs( stat : string? ) -> table  -- `sheet:getBuffs(stat?)` – return an array of buff info tables
Sheet:getCooldownRemaining( name : string )  -- `sheet:getCooldownRemaining(name)` – get remaining skill cooldown in seconds
Sheet:getEncumbrance() -> any  -- `sheet:getEncumbrance()` – returns current, max
Sheet:getFlags() -> table  -- `sheet:getFlags()` – list all set flag names
Sheet:getInitiative() -> any  -- `sheet:getInitiative()` – get base initiative
Sheet:getLevel() -> any  -- `sheet:getLevel()` – current character level
Sheet:getMax( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:getMax(name)` – get the attribute maximum (nil if unset)
Sheet:getMin( name : string )  -- `sheet:getMin(name)` – get the attribute minimum
Sheet:getMorale() -> any  -- `sheet:getMorale()` – returns current, max
Sheet:getRegen( name : string )  -- `sheet:getRegen(name)` – get regen rate
Sheet:getResistance( dtype : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:getResistance(damageType)` – get resistance value
Sheet:getSkillLevel( name : string )  -- `sheet:getSkillLevel(name)` – get current skill level
Sheet:getStatNames() -> any  -- `sheet:update(dt)` – tick buff durations, skill cooldowns, and regen
Sheet:getUseCount( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:getUseCount(name)` – number of times a stat was used
Sheet:getXP() -> any  -- `sheet:getXP()` – current XP in the current level
Sheet:hasFlag( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:hasFlag(name)` – check if a flag is set
Sheet:hasPerk( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:hasPerk(name)` – check if perk is acquired
Sheet:hasTrait( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:hasTrait(name)` – check if a trait is currently active
Sheet:isEncumbered() -> any  -- `sheet:isEncumbered()` – returns true if current > max
Sheet:learnSkill( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:learnSkill(name)` – unlock / increment skill level
Sheet:recordUse( name : string )  -- `sheet:recordUse(name)` – record a use for use-based growth
Sheet:recoverActionPoints( amount : number ) -> any  -- Recover action points on this Sheet
Sheet:removeBuff( handle : integer ) -> any  -- `sheet:removeBuff(handle)` – remove a buff by handle; returns true if found
Sheet:removeTrait( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:removeTrait(name)` – remove a trait's buffs; returns true if found
Sheet:restore( snap : table )  -- `sheet:restore(snapshot)` – restore from a snapshot table (attributes, xp, level, flags)
Sheet:setActionPoints( max : number )  -- `sheet:setActionPoints(max)` – initialise / reset action points
Sheet:setBase( name : string, value : number )  -- `sheet:setBase(name, value)` – set the base value
Sheet:setBerserkThreshold( val : number )  -- `sheet:setBerserkThreshold(val)` – set the morale level below which the unit goes berserk
Sheet:setEncumbrance( current : number, max : number )  -- `sheet:setEncumbrance(current, max)` – set encumbrance values
Sheet:setFlag( name : string )  -- `sheet:setFlag(name)` – set a boolean flag
Sheet:setInitiative( val : number )  -- `sheet:setInitiative(val)` – set base initiative
Sheet:setLevel( n : integer )  -- `sheet:setLevel(n)` – force-set character level
Sheet:setLevelThresholds( t : table )  -- `sheet:setLevelThresholds(t)` – t is an array of XP thresholds OR table with base/increment
Sheet:setMax( name : string, max : number )  -- `sheet:setMax(name, max)` – set the attribute maximum
Sheet:setMin( name : string, min : number )  -- `sheet:setMin(name, min)` – set the attribute minimum
Sheet:setMorale( max : number )  -- `sheet:setMorale(max)` – initialise morale with the given max
Sheet:setPanicThreshold( val : number )  -- `sheet:setPanicThreshold(val)` – set the morale level below which the unit panics
Sheet:setRegen( name : string, regen : number )  -- `sheet:setRegen(name, regen)` – set regen rate per second
Sheet:setResistance( dtype : string, val : number )  -- `sheet:setResistance(damageType, value)` – set a resistance (0.0..1.0)
Sheet:setXP( amount : number )  -- `sheet:setXP(amount)` – force-set XP (no level-up triggered)
Sheet:snapshot()  -- `sheet:snapshot()` – return a serialisable Lua table of all sheet state
Sheet:spendActionPoints( n : number ) -> any  -- `sheet:spendActionPoints(n)` – spend n action points; errors if insufficient
Sheet:update( dt : number )  -- Advances the simulation by `dt` seconds
Sheet:useSkill( name : string ) -> any  -- `sheet:useSkill(name)` – reduce cooldown counter. Returns remaining cooldown
```

## `luna.inventory` {#inventory}

> Lua API bindings for the `luna.inventory.*` slot-based inventory module.
>
> Provides `Item`, `ItemStack`, `Slot`, `Container`, `ItemSet`, and `Inventory`
> UserData objects for building RPG-style inventory systems in Lua.

```lua
luna.inventory.newContainer( name : string, mode_str : string?, slot_count : integer? ) -> any  -- New container
luna.inventory.newInventory()  -- New inventory
luna.inventory.newItem( item_type : string? ) -> any  -- New item
luna.inventory.newItemSet( name : string )  -- New item set
luna.inventory.newItemStack( item_ud : Item, qty : integer?, max_qty : integer? ) -> any  -- New item stack
luna.inventory.newSlot( slot_type : string?, state : string? ) -> any  -- New slot
```

### `Container`

```lua
Container:addSlot( opts : table? ) -> any  -- Adds slot to the collection
Container:countItem( item_type : string ) -> any  -- Returns the number of item
Container:expand( n : integer ) -> any  -- Expand on this Container
Container:getCurrentWeight() -> any  -- Returns the current weight
Container:getMaxSlots() -> any  -- Returns the max slots
Container:getMode() -> any  -- Returns the mode
Container:getName() -> any  -- Returns the name
Container:getSlot( index : integer ) -> any  -- Get a slot by 1-based index (Lua convention)
Container:getSlotCount() -> any  -- Returns the slot count
Container:getSlots() -> table  -- Returns the slots
Container:getWeightLimit() -> any  -- Returns the weight limit
Container:removeItem( item_type : string, qty : integer ) -> any  -- Removes item from the collection
Container:removeSlot( index : integer )  -- Removes slot from the collection
Container:setMaxSlots( n : integer )  -- Sets the max slots
Container:setWeightLimit( w : number )  -- Sets the weight limit
Container:toList() -> any  -- To list on this Container
```

### `Inventory`

```lua
Inventory:addItemSet( set_ud : ItemSet )  -- Adds item set to the collection
Inventory:countItem( item_type : string ) -> any  -- Returns the number of item
Inventory:disableSubsystem( name : string )  -- Disable subsystem on this Inventory
Inventory:enableSubsystem( name : string )  -- Enable subsystem on this Inventory
Inventory:getActiveSets() -> table  -- Returns the active sets
Inventory:getContainer( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the container
Inventory:getContainerNames() -> table  -- Returns the container names
Inventory:getEquipSlot( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the equip slot
Inventory:getEquipSlotNames() -> table  -- Returns the equip slot names
Inventory:getEquipped( slot_name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the equipped
Inventory:getItemSetNames() -> table  -- Returns the item set names
Inventory:getItemSets() -> any  -- Returns all registered item sets as ItemSet objects
Inventory:isSubsystemEnabled( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if subsystem enabled
Inventory:removeCallback( event : string )  -- Remove the callback for an inventory event
Inventory:removeContainer( name : string ) -> any  -- Removes container from the collection
Inventory:removeEquipSlot( name : string ) -> any  -- Removes equip slot from the collection
Inventory:unequip( slot_name : string ) -> any  -- Unequip on this Inventory
```

### `Item`

```lua
Item:addTag( tag : string )  -- Adds tag to the collection
Item:clone() -> any  -- Returns a deep copy of this object
Item:getResourceRef() -> any  -- Get the stored resource reference, or nil if none set
Item:getSize() -> any  -- Returns the size
Item:getStackLimit() -> any  -- Returns the stack limit
Item:getTags() -> table  -- Returns the tags
Item:getType() -> any  -- Returns the type
Item:getUserData() -> any  -- Get the stored user data, or nil if none set
Item:getWeight() -> any  -- Returns the weight
Item:hasTag( tag : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if tag
Item:removeTag( tag : string ) -> any  -- Removes tag from the collection
Item:setResourceRef( value : any )  -- Store any Lua value as a resource reference (e.g. a texture or sprite)
Item:setSize( w : integer, h : integer )  -- Sets the size
Item:setStackLimit( n : integer )  -- Sets the stack limit
Item:setType( t : string )  -- Sets the type
Item:setUserData( value : any )  -- Store any Lua value as user data on this item
Item:setWeight( w : number )  -- Sets the weight
```

### `ItemSet`

```lua
ItemSet:getBonusRef() -> any  -- Get the stored bonus data, or nil if none set
ItemSet:getName() -> any  -- Returns the name
ItemSet:getRequirementCount() -> integer  -- Returns the number of requirements in this set
ItemSet:getRequirements() -> table  -- Returns the requirements
ItemSet:isActive( inv_ud : Inventory ) -> any  -- Check if all requirements of this set are met by the inventory
ItemSet:setBonusRef( value : any )  -- Store bonus data (any Lua value) on this item set
```

### `ItemStack`

```lua
ItemStack:add( n : integer ) -> any  -- Adds an entry to the collection
ItemStack:clone() -> any  -- Returns a deep copy of this object
ItemStack:getItem() -> any  -- Returns the item
ItemStack:getMaxQuantity() -> any  -- Returns the max quantity
ItemStack:getQuantity() -> any  -- Returns the quantity
ItemStack:isFull() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if full
ItemStack:merge( other : ItemStack ) -> any  -- Merge on this ItemStack
ItemStack:remove( n : integer ) -> any  -- Removes the entry from the collection
ItemStack:setQuantity( n : integer )  -- Sets the quantity
ItemStack:split( n : integer ) -> any  -- Split on this ItemStack
```

### `Slot`

```lua
Slot:canAccept( item_ud : Item ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if accept
Slot:clear()  -- Removes all entries
Slot:getCapacity() -> any  -- Returns the capacity
Slot:getItem() -> any  -- Shortcut: get the item from the held stack, or nil if empty
Slot:getStack() -> any  -- Returns the stack
Slot:getState() -> any  -- Returns the state
Slot:getType() -> any  -- Returns the type
Slot:isEmpty() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if empty
Slot:setCapacity( w : integer, h : integer )  -- Sets the capacity
Slot:setStack( stack_ud : ItemStack ) -> any  -- Sets the stack
Slot:setState( s : string )  -- Sets the state
Slot:setType( t : string )  -- Sets the type
```

## `luna.crafting` {#crafting}

> Lua bindings for `luna.crafting.*`.
>
> This module is part of Luna2D's `lua_api` subsystem and provides the implementation
> details for crafting api-related operations and data management.
> Key types exported from this module: `LuaRecipe`, `LuaRecipeRegistry`, `LuaStation`, `LuaCraftSkill`, `LuaCraftQueue`.
> Primary functions: `register()`.

```lua
luna.crafting.newCraftQueue( max_jobs : integer? ) -> any  -- Creates a new craft queue instance
luna.crafting.newCraftSkill( name : string ) -> any  -- Creates a new craft skill instance
luna.crafting.newModifierPool( name : string ) -> any  -- Creates a new modifier pool
luna.crafting.newRecipe( id : string, recipe_type : string? ) -> any  -- Creates a new recipe instance
luna.crafting.newRecipeGroup( name : string ) -> any  -- Creates a new recipe group for UI organization
luna.crafting.newRecipeKnowledge() -> any  -- Creates a new recipe knowledge tracker
luna.crafting.newRegistry() -> any  -- Creates a new recipe registry instance
luna.crafting.newStation( station_type : string, level : integer? ) -> any  -- Creates a new station instance
luna.crafting.newUpgradeTree( name : string? ) -> any  -- Creates a new upgrade tree instance
```

### `CraftQueue`

Lua-callable handle wrapping [`CraftQueue`].

```lua
CraftQueue:cancel( id : integer ) -> any  -- Cancels the current operation
CraftQueue:clear()  -- Removes all entries
CraftQueue:collectCompleted() -> any  -- Returns the IDs of jobs that completed since the last collection
CraftQueue:count() -> integer  -- Returns the number of items
CraftQueue:enqueue( recipe_id : string, time : number, qty : integer? ) -> any  -- Enqueue on this CraftQueue
CraftQueue:getAllJobs() -> any  -- Returns the all jobs
CraftQueue:getIds() -> any  -- Returns the ids
CraftQueue:getJob( id : integer ) -> any  -- Returns the job
CraftQueue:getMaxJobs() -> any  -- Returns the max jobs
CraftQueue:isFull() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if full
CraftQueue:setJobPaused( id : integer, paused : boolean )  -- Sets the job paused
CraftQueue:update( dt : number ) -> any  -- Advances the simulation by `dt` seconds
```

### `CraftSkill`

Lua-callable handle wrapping [`CraftSkill`].

```lua
CraftSkill:addPerk( perk_id : string, req_level : integer, prereqs : table? )  -- Defines a perk node in this skill's perk tree
CraftSkill:addSpecialization( name : string )  -- Registers a specialization branch for this skill
CraftSkill:addXp( amount : number ) -> any  -- Adds `xp` to this skill's total, potentially triggering level-ups
CraftSkill:canUse( recipe : Recipe ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if this skill's level meets the minimum required to use the given recipe
CraftSkill:chooseSpecialization( name : string ) -> any  -- Locks in a specialization branch. Fails if already specialized
CraftSkill:getAvailablePerks() -> any  -- Returns perk IDs whose prerequisites and level requirements are met
CraftSkill:getLevel() -> any  -- Returns the current level derived from total XP
CraftSkill:getMaxLevel() -> any  -- Returns the maximum level this skill can reach
CraftSkill:getName() -> any  -- Returns the skill's name identifier
CraftSkill:getQualityBonus() -> any  -- Returns the quality bonus (0–1 fraction) from skill mastery
CraftSkill:getRecipeColor( recipe : Recipe ) -> any  -- Returns the WoW-style difficulty color for a recipe from this skill's perspective
CraftSkill:getSpecialization() -> any  -- Returns the chosen specialization name, or `nil` if none chosen yet
CraftSkill:getSpeedBonus() -> any  -- Returns the speed bonus (0–1 fraction) from skill mastery
CraftSkill:getXp() -> any  -- Returns the total accumulated XP for this skill
CraftSkill:getXpToNext() -> any  -- Returns the XP required to reach the next level
CraftSkill:getYieldBonus() -> any  -- Returns the yield/quantity bonus (0–1 fraction) from skill mastery
CraftSkill:hasPerk( perk_id : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if the given perk is unlocked
CraftSkill:setLevel( level : integer )  -- Sets the skill directly to the given level, adjusting XP accordingly
CraftSkill:skillUpChance( recipe : Recipe ) -> any  -- Returns the skill-up probability (0–1) for this skill when crafting a recipe
CraftSkill:unlockPerk( perk_id : string ) -> any  -- Attempts to unlock a perk. Fails if prerequisites or level not met
```

### `ModifierPool`

Lua-callable handle wrapping [`ModifierPool`].

```lua
ModifierPool:addModifier( name : string, weight : number, effects : table? )  -- Adds a modifier to the pool. Effects are a table of `{effectName: number}` pairs
ModifierPool:count() -> integer  -- Returns the number of entries in the pool
ModifierPool:getModifiers() -> any  -- Returns all modifier entries as a list of `{name, weight, effects}` tables
ModifierPool:getName() -> any  -- Returns the name of this modifier pool
ModifierPool:getTotalWeight() -> any  -- Returns the total combined weight of all pool entries
ModifierPool:removeModifier( name : string ) -> any  -- Removes a modifier by name. Returns `true` if it existed
ModifierPool:roll( seed : integer ) -> any  -- Rolls a random modifier using `seed` as a deterministic source
```

### `Recipe`

Lua-callable handle wrapping [`Recipe`].

```lua
Recipe:addByproduct( item_type : string, qty : integer, chance : number? )  -- Adds a byproduct output (produced alongside main outputs, not guaranteed)
Recipe:addCondition( cond_type : string, value : string )  -- Adds a crafting condition requirement for this recipe (e.g. biome, weather)
Recipe:addIngredient( item_type : string, qty : integer, consumed : boolean? )  -- Adds an ingredient requirement to this recipe
Recipe:addOutput( item_type : string, qty : integer, quality : string? )  -- Adds an output item produced when this recipe is completed
Recipe:addTag( tag : string )  -- Attaches a string tag to this recipe
Recipe:clearIngredients()  -- Removes all ingredients from this recipe
Recipe:clearOutputs()  -- Removes all outputs from this recipe
Recipe:getCategory() -> any  -- Returns the UI category string for this recipe
Recipe:getConditions() -> any  -- Returns all crafting conditions as a list of `{condType, value}` tables
Recipe:getCooldown() -> any  -- Returns the cooldown duration in seconds before this recipe can be used again
Recipe:getDescription() -> any  -- Returns the lore/description text for this recipe
Recipe:getId() -> any  -- Returns the unique string identifier of this recipe
Recipe:getIngredients() -> any  -- Returns a list of all ingredient requirements as `{id, count}` tables
Recipe:getName() -> any  -- Returns the human-readable display name of this recipe
Recipe:getOutputs() -> any  -- Returns a list of all output items as `{id, count}` tables
Recipe:getRandomModifierPool() -> any  -- Returns the ID of the modifier pool rolled on completion (empty = none)
Recipe:getSkill() -> any  -- Returns the skill name gated on this recipe, or an empty string if none
Recipe:getSkillUpCurve() -> any  -- Returns the skill-up XP curve name: `'linear'`, `'quadratic'`, `'exponential'`
Recipe:getSkillXp() -> any  -- Returns the XP awarded to the required skill when this recipe is completed
Recipe:getStationLevel() -> any  -- Returns the minimum station level required to craft this recipe
Recipe:getStationType() -> any  -- Returns the station type string required to craft this recipe
Recipe:getTags() -> any  -- Returns a list of all tags attached to this recipe
Recipe:getTime() -> any  -- Returns the base crafting duration in seconds
Recipe:getType() -> any  -- Returns the recipe type tag (e.g. `'smelt'`, `'craft'`)
Recipe:hasTag( tag : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if this recipe carries the given tag
Recipe:isEnabled() -> any  -- Returns `true` if this recipe is currently craftable (not disabled)
Recipe:isHandCraftable() -> any  -- Returns `true` if this recipe can be crafted without a station
Recipe:isOutputQualityScaling() -> any  -- Returns whether output quality scales with the crafter's skill level
Recipe:setCategory( v : string )  -- Sets the UI category for this recipe (e.g. `'weapons'`, `'potions'`)
Recipe:setCooldown( v : number )  -- Sets the cooldown duration in seconds
Recipe:setDescription( v : string )  -- Sets the description text shown in crafting UI
Recipe:setEnabled( v : boolean )  -- Enables or disables this recipe. Disabled recipes cannot be enqueued
Recipe:setHandCraftable( v : boolean )  -- Sets whether this recipe can be crafted without a station
Recipe:setName( v : string )  -- Sets the display name of this recipe
Recipe:setOutputQualityScaling( v : boolean )  -- Sets whether output quality scales with the crafter's skill level
Recipe:setRandomModifierPool( v : string )  -- Sets the modifier pool to roll on completion
Recipe:setSkill( name : string, level : integer? )  -- Sets the skill required to unlock and use this recipe
Recipe:setSkillUpCurve( v : string )  -- Sets the skill-up XP curve name
Recipe:setSkillXp( v : number )  -- Sets the skill XP awarded on completion
Recipe:setStationLevel( v : integer )  -- Sets the minimum station level required to craft this recipe
Recipe:setStationType( v : string )  -- Sets which station type is required for this recipe
Recipe:setTime( v : number )  -- Sets the base crafting duration in seconds
```

### `RecipeGroup`

Lua-callable handle wrapping [`RecipeGroup`].

```lua
RecipeGroup:addRecipe( id : string )  -- Adds a recipe ID to this group (no-op if already present)
RecipeGroup:contains( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if this group contains the given recipe ID
RecipeGroup:count() -> integer  -- Returns the number of recipes in this group
RecipeGroup:getIcon() -> any  -- Returns the icon asset path for this group
RecipeGroup:getName() -> any  -- Returns the group name
RecipeGroup:getOrder() -> any  -- Returns the display order index
RecipeGroup:getRecipes() -> any  -- Returns all recipe IDs in this group
RecipeGroup:removeRecipe( id : string ) -> any  -- Removes a recipe ID from this group. Returns `true` if it was present
RecipeGroup:setIcon( v : string )  -- Sets the icon asset path
RecipeGroup:setName( v : string )  -- Sets the group name
RecipeGroup:setOrder( v : integer )  -- Sets the display order index
```

### `RecipeKnowledge`

Lua-callable handle wrapping [`RecipeKnowledge`].

```lua
RecipeKnowledge:clear()  -- Clears all recipe knowledge
RecipeKnowledge:count() -> integer  -- Returns the number of known recipes
RecipeKnowledge:discover( id : string, source : string? )  -- Marks a recipe as discovered with an optional source string
RecipeKnowledge:forget( id : string ) -> any  -- Removes knowledge of a recipe. Returns `true` if the recipe was known
RecipeKnowledge:getKnown() -> any  -- Returns a list of all known recipe IDs
RecipeKnowledge:getResearchCost( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns the research cost for a recipe (0 if not set)
RecipeKnowledge:getSource( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns the discovery source for a recipe, or `nil` if unknown
RecipeKnowledge:isAutoDiscover() -> any  -- Returns `true` if auto-discover mode is on
RecipeKnowledge:isKnown( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if the recipe is known (or auto-discover is on)
RecipeKnowledge:isPrototyped( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if the recipe has been prototyped
RecipeKnowledge:prototype( id : string ) -> any  -- Permanently learns a recipe via the prototype mechanic (Don't Starve pattern)
RecipeKnowledge:research( id : string, scrap : number ) -> any  -- Attempts to research a recipe by spending `scrap`. Returns `false` if not enough
RecipeKnowledge:setAutoDiscover( v : boolean )  -- Enables or disables auto-discovery mode (all recipes always known)
RecipeKnowledge:setResearchCost( id : string, cost : number )  -- Sets the resource cost required to research a recipe (Rust blueprint pattern)
```

### `RecipeRegistry`

Lua-callable handle wrapping [`RecipeRegistry`].

```lua
RecipeRegistry:add( recipe : Recipe )  -- Registers a recipe in this registry. Raises an error if a recipe with the same ID already exists
RecipeRegistry:count() -> integer  -- Returns the total number of registered recipes
RecipeRegistry:findByIngredient( item_type : string ) -> any  -- Returns all recipes that consume an item with the given ID as an ingredient
RecipeRegistry:findByOutput( item_type : string ) -> any  -- Returns all recipes that produce an item with the given ID
RecipeRegistry:findByTag( tag : string ) -> any  -- Returns all recipes that carry the given tag
RecipeRegistry:forStation( station_type : string ) -> any  -- Returns all recipes that require the given station type
RecipeRegistry:get( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns the registered recipe with the given ID, or `nil` if none exists
RecipeRegistry:getAll() -> any  -- Returns all recipes in registration order as a list of `Recipe` objects
RecipeRegistry:getByCategory( category : string ) -> any  -- Returns all recipe IDs in the given UI category
RecipeRegistry:getIds() -> any  -- Returns a list of all registered recipe IDs
RecipeRegistry:register( recipe : Recipe )  -- Alias for `add`. Registers a recipe (error if duplicate ID)
RecipeRegistry:remove( id : string ) -> any  -- Removes the recipe with the given ID from this registry
RecipeRegistry:unregister( id : string ) -> any  -- Alias for `remove`. Unregisters the recipe with the given ID
```

### `Station`

Lua-callable handle wrapping [`Station`].

```lua
Station:addFuel( amount : number )  -- Adds fuel to this station, clamped to capacity
Station:canProcess( recipe : Recipe ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if this station can currently process the given recipe (level and type match)
Station:consumeFuel( amount : number ) -> any  -- Consumes fuel from this station. Returns `false` if insufficient fuel
Station:effectiveTime( recipe : Recipe ) -> any  -- Returns the effective crafting time for `recipe` after applying this station's speed multiplier
Station:getFuelCapacity() -> any  -- Returns the maximum fuel capacity of this station
Station:getFuelLevel() -> any  -- Returns the current fuel level of this station
Station:getLevel() -> any  -- Returns the current upgrade level of this station
Station:getMaxLevel() -> any  -- Returns the maximum upgrade level this station can reach
Station:getMetadata( key : string ) -> any  -- Returns a stored metadata value by key
Station:getName() -> any  -- Returns the display name of this station
Station:getOutputMultiplier() -> any  -- Returns the output quantity multiplier applied by this station
Station:getPosition() -> any  -- Returns the station's world position as `(x, y)`
Station:getProximityRadius() -> any  -- Returns the proximity radius within which players can use this station
Station:getQualityBonus() -> any  -- Returns the quality bonus applied to crafted items at this station
Station:getSpeedMultiplier() -> any  -- Returns the crafting speed multiplier. `1.0` is normal speed
Station:getType() -> any  -- Returns the station type identifier string
Station:isActive() -> any  -- Returns `true` if this station is operational and can process recipes
Station:isInRange( x : number, y : number ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if the given world position is within this station's proximity radius
Station:setActive( v : boolean )  -- Enables or disables this station
Station:setFuelCapacity( v : number )  -- Sets the maximum fuel capacity
Station:setFuelLevel( v : number )  -- Sets the fuel level directly
Station:setLevel( v : integer )  -- Sets the station's upgrade level, affecting which recipes it can process
Station:setMaxLevel( v : integer )  -- Sets the maximum upgrade level for this station
Station:setMetadata( key : string, val : string )  -- Stores a metadata key-value pair on this station
Station:setName( v : string )  -- Sets the display name of this station
Station:setOutputMultiplier( v : number )  -- Sets the output quantity multiplier for this station
Station:setPosition( x : number, y : number )  -- Sets the station's world position
Station:setProximityRadius( v : number )  -- Sets the proximity radius for this station
Station:setQualityBonus( v : number )  -- Sets the quality bonus applied to crafted items at this station
Station:setSpeedMultiplier( v : number )  -- Sets the crafting speed multiplier. Values above `1.0` reduce effective recipe time
Station:upgrade() -> any  -- Increments station level by 1. Returns `false` if already at max level
```

### `UpgradeTree`

Lua-callable handle wrapping [`UpgradeTree`].

```lua
UpgradeTree:addEdge( from_id : string, to_id : string )  -- Adds a directed edge from `from_id` to `to_id` in the DAG
UpgradeTree:addNode( id : string, name : string, prereqs : table? )  -- Adds node to the collection
UpgradeTree:canUnlock( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if unlock
UpgradeTree:count() -> integer  -- Returns the number of items
UpgradeTree:getAllNodes() -> any  -- Returns all node data as a list of `{id, name, unlocked, recipeId, outputItemType}` tables
UpgradeTree:getChildren( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns direct children of the given node
UpgradeTree:getName() -> any  -- Returns the name
UpgradeTree:getNode( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns data for a single node as a table, or `nil` if not found
UpgradeTree:getNodeCost( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns the node cost
UpgradeTree:getNodeIds() -> any  -- Returns the node ids
UpgradeTree:getParent( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns the parent node ID of the given node, or `nil` if it is a root
UpgradeTree:getPath( from : string, to : string ) -> any  -- Returns the shortest path of node IDs from `from` to `to`, or an empty table
UpgradeTree:getRootNodes() -> any  -- Returns all root node IDs (nodes with no parents)
UpgradeTree:getUnlockedIds() -> any  -- Returns the unlocked ids
UpgradeTree:isUnlocked( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if unlocked
UpgradeTree:resetNode( id : string ) -> any  -- Reset node on this UpgradeTree
UpgradeTree:setNodeCost( id : string, cost_table : table )  -- Sets the node cost
UpgradeTree:unlock( id : string ) -> any  -- Unlock on this UpgradeTree
```

## `luna.cardgame` {#cardgame}

> Lua bindings for `luna.cardgame.*`.
>
> Exposes Card, Stack, StackBuilder, StackManager, CardPool, Slot, StackHistory,
> and group-analysis utilities to Lua scripts via the `luna.cardgame` namespace.

```lua
luna.cardgame.clearTypes()  -- Clears all registered item types
luna.cardgame.defineType( name : string, def_tbl : table )  -- Defines a card type in the global registry
luna.cardgame.findAtLeastNOfStat( items_tbl : table, stat : string, n : integer ) -> any  -- Finds groups where at least `n` items share the same stat integer value
luna.cardgame.findNOfStat( items_tbl : table, stat : string, n : integer ) -> any  -- Finds groups where exactly `n` items share the same stat integer value
luna.cardgame.findSequences( items_tbl : table, stat : string, min_run : integer ) -> any  -- Finds consecutive integer stat sequences of length ≥ `min_run`
luna.cardgame.findTagGroups( items_tbl : table, prefix : string, min_size : integer ) -> any  -- Finds groups of items sharing a tag-prefix value (flush-style), min size `min_size`
luna.cardgame.getType( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the definition table for a registered type, or `nil` if not found
luna.cardgame.getTypeNames() -> table  -- Returns an array table of all registered type names
luna.cardgame.groupByCategory( items_tbl : table ) -> any  -- Groups items by category.  Returns `{ [category] = {LuaItem, …}, … }`
luna.cardgame.groupByStat( items_tbl : table, stat : string ) -> any  -- Groups items in an array table by the integer part of a stat
luna.cardgame.groupByTagPrefix( items_tbl : table, prefix : string ) -> any  -- Groups items by a tag prefix such as `"suit"`
luna.cardgame.newCard( type_name : string ) -> Card  -- Creates a new item by seeding from the registered type
luna.cardgame.newCardPool( name : string? ) -> any  -- Creates a new `CardPool`
luna.cardgame.newDeckBuilder( name : string? ) -> any  -- Creates a new `StackBuilder`
luna.cardgame.newEffectStack() -> any  -- Creates a new LIFO `EffectStack` for effect resolution
luna.cardgame.newHistory( max_size : integer? ) -> any  -- Creates a new `StackHistory`
luna.cardgame.newSlot( name : string, cap : integer? ) -> any  -- Creates a new `Slot`
luna.cardgame.newStack( name : string, cap : integer? ) -> any  -- Creates a new empty stack
luna.cardgame.newStackManager() -> any  -- Alias for `newEffectStack` (LIFO effect resolution stack)
luna.cardgame.newZoneManager() -> any  -- Creates a new `StackManager`
```

### `Card`

with per-instance script and asset storage.

```lua
Card:addCounter( name : string, delta : integer )  -- Adds `delta` to a counter
Card:addStat( name : string, delta : number )  -- Adds `delta` to a named stat (creates it at `delta` if absent)
Card:addTag( tag : string )  -- Adds a tag if not already present
Card:canPlay( ctx : any ) -> boolean  -- Returns whether this card can be played.  Calls cost_check if set; returns `true` otherwise
Card:clearCounters()  -- Clears all counters
Card:clone() -> Card  -- Deep-copies the card (new instance, same stats/tags/counters)
Card:fireScript( event : string, args : MultiValue ) -> any  -- Fires a named script hook with optional extra arguments
Card:getAllMeta() -> table  -- Returns all metadata as a `{key=value}` table
Card:getAsset( key : string ) -> any  -- Retrieves an asset value, or `nil` if not set
Card:getCardType() -> any  -- Returns the type identifier string for this card
Card:getCategory() -> any  -- Returns the category string
Card:getController() -> any  -- Returns the controller identifier (may differ from owner)
Card:getCounter( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns an integer counter (0 if absent)
Card:getCounters() -> table  -- Returns all counters as a `{key=value}` table
Card:getId() -> any  -- Returns the unique instance ID of this card
Card:getMeta( key : string ) -> any  -- Returns a metadata string value (empty string if absent)
Card:getName() -> any  -- Returns the display name of this card
Card:getOwner() -> any  -- Returns the owner identifier
Card:getRarity() -> any  -- Returns the rarity tier string
Card:getScript( event : string ) -> any  -- Returns the script function for an event, or `nil`
Card:getSlot() -> any  -- Returns the current slot identifier
Card:getStat( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the value of a named numeric stat (0 if absent)
Card:getStats() -> table  -- Returns all stats as a `{key=value}` table
Card:getStats() -> table  -- Returns all stats as a `{key=value}` table
Card:getSubtype() -> any  -- Returns the subtype string
Card:getTags() -> table  -- Returns all tags as an array table
Card:getTilePosition() -> any  -- Returns tile position as (x, y)
Card:getTileSize() -> any  -- Returns tile footprint as (w, h)
Card:getZone() -> any  -- Returns the current zone/slot string
Card:hasStat( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if the named stat is explicitly set
Card:hasTag( tag : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if the card has the given tag
Card:isFaceUp() -> any  -- Returns `true` if the card is face-up
Card:isTapped() -> any  -- Returns `true` if the card is tapped/exhausted
Card:modifyCounter( name : string, delta : integer ) -> any  -- Adds `delta` to a counter and returns the new value
Card:modifyStat( name : string, delta : number ) -> any  -- Adds `delta` to a stat and returns the new value
Card:payCost( ctx : any )  -- Pays the card's cost.  Calls cost_pay if set; no-op otherwise
Card:removeTag( tag : string )  -- Removes a tag
Card:resetStats()  -- Resets all stats to the card type defaults
Card:restore( snap : table )  -- Restores data fields from a snapshot table (as returned by `snapshot()`)
Card:setAsset( key : string, value : any )  -- Stores an arbitrary Lua value under `key`
Card:setCategory( cat : string )  -- Sets the category string
Card:setController( c : string )  -- Sets the controller identifier
Card:setCostCheck( func : function )  -- Sets a custom cost-check function: `setCostCheck(function(card, ctx) return bool end)`
Card:setCostPay( func : function )  -- Sets a custom cost-pay function
Card:setCounter( name : string, value : integer )  -- Sets an integer counter
Card:setFaceUp( v : boolean )  -- Sets face-up state
Card:setMeta( key : string, value : string )  -- Sets a metadata string value
Card:setName( name : string )  -- Sets the card's display name
Card:setOwner( owner : string )  -- Sets the owner identifier
Card:setRarity( r : string )  -- Sets the rarity tier string
Card:setScript( event : string, func : function )  -- Sets a per-instance script hook: `setScript("onPlay", function(card) ... end)`
Card:setSlot( slot : string )  -- Sets the current slot identifier
Card:setStat( name : string, value : number )  -- Sets a named numeric stat
Card:setSubtype( s : string )  -- Sets the subtype string
Card:setTapped( v : boolean )  -- Sets tapped/exhausted state
Card:setTilePosition( x : integer, y : integer )  -- Sets tile position
Card:setTileSize( w : integer, h : integer )  -- Sets tile footprint
Card:setZone( zone : string )  -- Sets the current zone/slot string
Card:snapshot() -> table  -- Serializes this card to a Lua table (data fields only, no functions)
```

### `CardPool`

Consult the module-level documentation for the broader usage context and preconditions.

```lua
CardPool:add( type_name : string, weight : integer )  -- Adds a type with the given weight
CardPool:addCardType( type_name : string, weight : integer )  -- Adds a card type with weight (alias for `add`)
CardPool:drawByRarity( dist : table ) -> table  -- Draws cards by rarity distribution `{rarity_name = count, ...}`
CardPool:drawItems( n : integer ) -> table  -- Draws `n` items (with replacement) as `LuaItem` values; returns an array table
CardPool:drawRandom( n : integer, seed : integer? ) -> table  -- Draws `n` cards; optional u64 `seed` makes the draw deterministic
CardPool:drawTypes( n : integer ) -> table  -- Draws `n` type-name strings (with replacement); returns an array table
CardPool:drawUniqueItems( n : integer ) -> table  -- Draws up to `n` unique items; returns an array table
CardPool:drawUniqueTypes( n : integer ) -> table  -- Draws up to `n` unique type-name strings; returns an array table
CardPool:getCardTypeCount() -> integer  -- Returns the number of distinct card types in the pool
CardPool:getCardTypes() -> table  -- Returns the list of type names present in the pool
CardPool:getName() -> any  -- Returns the name
CardPool:getWeight( type_name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the weight for `type_name`, or 0 if not present
CardPool:isEmpty() -> boolean  -- Returns true if empty
CardPool:remove( type_name : string )  -- Removes a type from the pool
CardPool:setName( name : string )  -- Sets the pool name
CardPool:setRarityWeight( rarity : string, weight : integer )  -- Sets the rarity-tier weight used by `drawByRarity`
CardPool:setWeight( type_name : string, weight : integer )  -- Sets the weight for an existing entry
CardPool:size() -> integer  -- Returns the number of items
CardPool:totalWeight() -> any  -- Total weight
```

### `DeckBuilder`

with optional Lua custom validation rules.

```lua
DeckBuilder:add( type_name : string, count : integer )  -- Adds `count` copies of `type_name` to the build list
DeckBuilder:addBannedType( type_name : string )  -- Bans a type (alias for `banType`)
DeckBuilder:addCustomRule( name : string, func : function )  -- Adds a custom validation rule `fn(stack) -> string|nil`
DeckBuilder:addRequiredCategory( cat : string, min : integer, max : integer? )  -- Requires cards matching category `cat` appear between `min` and optional `max` times
DeckBuilder:addRequiredTag( tag : string, min : integer )  -- Requires at least `min` cards with the given tag
DeckBuilder:addWith( type_name : string, count : integer, overrides : table )  -- Adds `count` copies with per-entry overrides supplied as a table
DeckBuilder:banType( type_name : string )  -- Marks a type as banned (must not appear)
DeckBuilder:build( name : string? ) -> any  -- Builds and returns an `ItemStack`.  Errors if entry types are unknown
DeckBuilder:getBannedTypes() -> table  -- Returns the list of banned types as an array table
DeckBuilder:getMaxCards() -> any  -- Returns the maximum card count
DeckBuilder:getMaxCopies() -> any  -- Returns the maximum copies of any single type
DeckBuilder:getMinCards() -> any  -- Returns the minimum card count
DeckBuilder:removeBannedType( type_name : string )  -- Removes a type from the ban list
DeckBuilder:removeCustomRule( name : string )  -- Removes a custom validation rule by name
DeckBuilder:requireType( type_name : string )  -- Marks a type as required (must appear in any validated stack)
DeckBuilder:setMaxCards( n : integer )  -- Sets maximum card count for validation (0 = unlimited)
DeckBuilder:setMaxCopies( n : integer )  -- Sets the maximum number of copies of any single type
DeckBuilder:setMaxCopiesForType( type_name : string, n : integer )  -- Sets a per-type copy limit
DeckBuilder:setMaxSize( n : integer )  -- Sets the maximum stack size for validation (0 = unlimited)
DeckBuilder:setMinCards( n : integer )  -- Sets minimum card count for validation
DeckBuilder:setMinSize( n : integer )  -- Sets the minimum stack size for validation
DeckBuilder:setShuffleOnBuild( flag : boolean )  -- Sets shuffle-on-build flag
DeckBuilder:validate( stack : Stack ) -> any  -- Validates `stack` against all constraints (size, copies, banned, required)
DeckBuilder:validateEntries() -> table  -- Validates the current build entries.  Returns an array table of error strings
DeckBuilder:validateStack( stack : Stack ) -> table  -- Validates an existing `ItemStack` against the builder's constraints
```

### `EffectStack`

Lua-facing LIFO effect stack.  Each entry is a Lua table describing an effect.

```lua
EffectStack:clear()  -- Clears all entries
EffectStack:findByCard( card : Card ) -> any  -- Returns an array of 1-based indices where `entry.card` matches the given card (by id)
EffectStack:getCount() -> integer  -- Returns the number of entries
EffectStack:getEntries() -> table  -- Returns all entries as an array (top is last)
EffectStack:insertEntry( entry : table, idx : integer )  -- Inserts an entry at 1-based position from the top
EffectStack:isEmpty() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if the stack is empty
EffectStack:peek() -> any  -- Peeks at the top entry without removing it, or `nil` if empty
EffectStack:pop() -> any  -- Pops and returns the top entry, or `nil` if empty
EffectStack:push( entry : table )  -- Pushes an entry table onto the top of the stack
EffectStack:removeEntry( idx : integer ) -> boolean  -- Removes the entry at 1-based index.  Returns `true` if it was present
EffectStack:resolve() -> any  -- Resolves the top entry: calls `entry.card:fireScript("onEffect", entry)`
EffectStack:resolveAll() -> any  -- Resolves all entries from top to bottom.  Returns the count resolved
```

### `History`

Consult the module-level documentation for the broader usage context and preconditions.

```lua
History:clear()  -- Clears the state
History:entries() -> table  -- Returns all entries as an array of `{seq, stack, action, sizeAfter}` tables
History:isEmpty() -> boolean  -- Returns true if empty
History:last() -> any  -- Returns the last entry as a table `{seq, stack, action, sizeAfter}`, or `nil`
History:len() -> integer  -- Returns the number of items
History:recordCustom( stack_name : string, label : string, size_after : integer )  -- Records a custom event label for a named stack
```

### `Slot`

Consult the module-level documentation for the broader usage context and preconditions.

```lua
Slot:capacity() -> any  -- Capacity
Slot:clear() -> table  -- Clears the slot; returns the cards as an array table
Slot:getName() -> any  -- Returns the name
Slot:hasItemOfType( type_name : string ) -> any  -- Returns true if item of type
Slot:hasItemWithTag( tag : string ) -> any  -- Returns true if item with tag
Slot:isEmpty() -> boolean  -- Returns true if empty
Slot:isFull() -> boolean  -- Returns true if full
Slot:items() -> table  -- Returns all items as an array table
Slot:peek() -> Card?  -- Peeks at the top card without removing it
Slot:pop() -> Card?  -- Pops a card from the slot
Slot:push( card : Card )  -- Pushes a card into the slot
Slot:setCapacity( cap : integer )  -- Sets the capacity (pass 0 for unlimited)
Slot:size() -> integer  -- Returns the number of items
```

### `Stack`

Consult the module-level documentation for the broader usage context and preconditions.

```lua
Stack:addCard( card : Card ) -> any  -- Adds a card to the top; returns `false` if full
Stack:addCardBottom( card : Card ) -> any  -- Adds a card to the bottom; returns `false` if full
Stack:capacity() -> any  -- Capacity
Stack:clear()  -- Clears all items from the stack
Stack:contains( card : Card ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if the stack contains the given card (by identity)
Stack:countByCategory( cat : string ) -> any  -- Returns the count of items with a given category
Stack:countByTag( tag : string ) -> any  -- Returns the count of items with a given tag
Stack:countByType( type_name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the count of items with a given type name
Stack:drawCard() -> Card?  -- Draws (pops) the top card; returns `nil` if empty. Alias for `pop`
Stack:drawCardBottom() -> Card?  -- Draws (pops) the bottom card; returns `nil` if empty. Alias for `popBottom`
Stack:drawCards( n : integer ) -> table  -- Draws `n` cards from the top; returns an array table. Alias for `popMany`
Stack:filter( pred : function ) -> table  -- Returns an array table of cards matching a Lua predicate function
Stack:findByCategory( cat : string ) -> table  -- Returns all cards of the given category as an array table
Stack:findByType( type_name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the index (1-based) of the first item with the given type name, or `nil`
Stack:getCapacity() -> any  -- Returns the capacity limit, or -1 for unlimited
Stack:getCardCount() -> integer  -- Returns the number of cards (alias for `size`)
Stack:getCards() -> table  -- Returns all cards as an array table (alias for `items`)
Stack:getName() -> any  -- Returns the name
Stack:insertAt( idx : integer, card : Card )  -- Inserts a card at 1-based index
Stack:insertCard( idx : integer, card : Card ) -> any  -- Inserts a card at 1-based index. Alias for `insertAt`
Stack:isEmpty() -> boolean  -- Returns true if empty
Stack:isFull() -> boolean  -- Returns true if full
Stack:isOrdered() -> any  -- Returns true if this zone preserves insertion order
Stack:isPublic() -> any  -- Returns true if cards in this zone are visible to all players
Stack:items() -> table  -- Returns an array table of all items (top is last)
Stack:moveAllCards( dst : Stack ) -> any  -- Moves all cards from this stack to `dst`; returns the number moved
Stack:moveCard( card : Card, dst : Stack ) -> boolean  -- Moves a specific card from this stack to `dst`; returns `true` on success
Stack:peek() -> Card?  -- Peeks at the top card without removing it; returns `nil` if empty
Stack:peekAt( pos : integer ) -> Card?  -- Peeks at item at 1-based position from the top without removing it
Stack:pop() -> Card?  -- Pops the top card; returns `nil` if empty
Stack:popBottom() -> Card?  -- Pops the bottom card; returns `nil` if empty
Stack:popMany( n : integer ) -> table  -- Pops `n` items from the top; returns an array table
Stack:push( card : Card )  -- Pushes a `LuaItem` onto the top of the stack
Stack:pushBottom( card : Card )  -- Pushes a `LuaItem` to the bottom of the stack
Stack:removeAt( idx : integer ) -> Card?  -- Removes item at 1-based index; returns the card or `nil`
Stack:removeCard( card : Card ) -> boolean  -- Removes a specific card by identity; returns `true` if removed
Stack:setCapacity( n : integer )  -- Sets the capacity limit (`0` or negative removes the limit)
Stack:setName( name : string )  -- Sets the name of this stack
Stack:setOrdered( v : boolean )  -- Sets whether this zone preserves insertion order
Stack:setPublic( v : boolean )  -- Sets whether cards are visible to all players
Stack:shuffle()  -- Shuffles the stack in place
Stack:size() -> integer  -- Returns the number of items
Stack:sort( cmp : function )  -- Sorts the stack using a Lua comparator function `(a, b) -> bool`
Stack:sortByCategory()  -- Sorts alphabetically by category
Stack:sortByName()  -- Sorts alphabetically by card name
Stack:sortByStat( stat : string )  -- Sorts ascending by a named stat
Stack:sortByStatDesc( stat : string )  -- Sorts descending by a named stat
```

### `ZoneManager`

Consult the module-level documentation for the broader usage context and preconditions.

```lua
ZoneManager:addStack( name : string, stack : Stack )  -- Adds an externally-created `ItemStack` into the manager
ZoneManager:createStack( name : string )  -- Creates an empty, unbounded stack with the given name
ZoneManager:createStackCapped( name : string, cap : integer )  -- Creates an empty stack with a capacity cap

ZoneManager:removeStack( name : string )  -- Removes a stack by name
```

## `luna.combat` {#combat}

> Lua bindings for the `luna.combat.*` vehicle combat API.
>
> This module is part of Luna2D's `lua_api` subsystem and provides the implementation
> details for combat api-related operations and data management.
> Key types exported from this module: `LuaCollisionGroupSet`, `LuaChassis`, `LuaTurret`, `LuaWeapon`, `LuaProjectile`.
> Primary functions: `register()`.

```lua
luna.combat.newChassis( body_id : integer, max_hp : number ) -> any  -- Creates a new `Chassis` with the given body ID and max HP
luna.combat.newCollisionGroupSet() -> any  -- Creates a new `CollisionGroupSet`
luna.combat.newCombatWorld() -> any  -- Creates a new empty `CombatWorld`
luna.combat.newProjectilePool( size : integer, proj_type : string? ) -> any  -- Creates a new `ProjectilePool` with the given capacity
luna.combat.newTurret( body_id : integer, joint_id : integer ) -> any  -- Creates a new `Turret` with the given body and joint IDs
luna.combat.newWeapon( name : string ) -> any  -- Creates a new fire-rate `Weapon` with the given name
```

### `Chassis`

Lua wrapper for `Chassis`. Consult the module-level documentation for the broader usage context and preconditions.

```lua
Chassis:addSlot( tbl : table )  -- Adds a mount slot from a Lua table with fields id, x, y, sizeClass, arcMin, arcMax
Chassis:destroy()  -- Destroys the chassis, setting HP to 0 and destroyed to true
Chassis:getArmor( zone : string ) -> any  -- Returns the armor value for a named zone
Chassis:getBodyId() -> any  -- Returns the physics body ID for this chassis
Chassis:getHp() -> any  -- Returns current HP
Chassis:getMaxHp() -> any  -- Returns maximum HP

Chassis:setMaxHp( v : number )  -- Sets maximum HP
Chassis:setTeam( v : string )  -- Sets the team identifier
```

## `luna.log` {#log}

> Structured game-level logging API (`luna.log.*`).
>
> Exposes convenience logging functions so Lua scripts can emit messages at
> specific severity levels and query or change the active log level at
> runtime without going through the `luna.system` namespace.

```lua
luna.log.debug( message : string )  -- Emit a debug-severity log message from Lua
luna.log.error( message : string )  -- Emit an error-severity log message from Lua
luna.log.getLevel()  -- Return the name of the currently active minimum log level
luna.log.info( message : string )  -- Emit an info-severity log message from Lua
luna.log.print( level : string, message : string )  -- Emit a log message from Lua at the specified severity level
luna.log.setLevel( level : string )  -- Set the minimum severity level for runtime log messages
luna.log.warn( message : string )  -- Emit a warn-severity log message from Lua
```

---

## `luna.debug` {#debug}

> Registers the `luna.devtools.*` runtime diagnostics and developer tools API.
>
> Five subsystems: structured logger, hierarchical profiler, frame statistics,
> file watcher, and Lua debug bridge. All module-level functions — no
> registered types.

```lua
luna.debug.clearLog()  -- Clears all log history
luna.debug.clearWatches()  -- Clears all watched paths
luna.debug.eval( code : string ) -> any  -- Evaluates a Lua string and returns success flag plus results
luna.debug.getCallStack( max_depth : integer? ) -> any  -- Returns the Lua call stack as a table of stack frames
luna.debug.getFrameHistory() -> table  -- Returns the raw frame time history
luna.debug.getFrameHistorySize() -> boolean  -- Returns the current frame history buffer size
luna.debug.getFrameStats()  -- Returns computed frame statistics
luna.debug.getLogConsole()  -- Returns whether console output is enabled
luna.debug.getLogFile() -> table  -- Returns the current log file path
luna.debug.getLogHistory( count : integer? ) -> table  -- Returns the last `count` log entries (default all)
luna.debug.getLogLevel()  -- Returns the current minimum log level
luna.debug.getProfileData( frame : integer? ) -> table  -- Returns zone data for a specific frame (0 = most recent)
luna.debug.getProfileFrameCount() -> table  -- Returns the number of retained profile frames
luna.debug.getWatchInterval()  -- Returns the current watch interval
luna.debug.getWatchedPaths() -> table  -- Returns all watched file paths
luna.debug.isConsoleOpen()  -- Returns whether the console is considered open
luna.debug.isProfilingEnabled()  -- Returns whether the profiler is enabled
luna.debug.log( level : string, message : string )  -- Log at any level with optional source/line info
luna.debug.openConsole() -> boolean  -- Opens a console window (no-op on non-Windows)
luna.debug.profileFrame()  -- Seals the current frame of profiling data
luna.debug.profilePop( name : string? )  -- Ends the most recent timing zone
luna.debug.profilePush( name : string )  -- Starts a named timing zone
luna.debug.recordFrameTime( dt_val : number )  -- Records a frame time sample
luna.debug.resetProfile()  -- Clears all profiling state
luna.debug.scan() -> table  -- Scans watched files and returns paths whose modification time changed
luna.debug.setFrameHistorySize( size : integer )  -- Sets the maximum frame history buffer size (clamped 10–10000)
luna.debug.setLogConsole( enabled : boolean )  -- Toggles stderr console output
luna.debug.setLogFile( path : string )  -- Sets the log file path. Empty string disables file logging
luna.debug.setLogLevel( level : string )  -- Sets the minimum log level to record
luna.debug.setProfilingEnabled( enabled : boolean )  -- Enables or disables the profiler
luna.debug.setWatchInterval( interval : number )  -- Sets the advisory watch interval in seconds
luna.debug.unwatch( path : string ) -> boolean  -- Removes a file from the watch list
luna.debug.watch( path : string ) -> boolean  -- Registers a file path for modification-time polling
```

---

## `luna.battle` {#battle}

> Lua bindings for the `luna.battle.*` turn-based battle API.
>
> This module is part of Luna2D's `lua_api` subsystem and provides the implementation
> details for battle api-related operations and data management.
> Key types exported from this module: `LuaStatusEffect`, `LuaCombatAction`, `LuaCombatant`, `LuaCombatBattle`.
> Primary functions: `register()`.

```lua
luna.battle.newAction( name : string ) -> any  -- New action
luna.battle.newBattle( name : string? ) -> any  -- New battle
luna.battle.newCombatant( name : string ) -> any  -- New combatant
luna.battle.newStatusEffect( name : string, duration : integer? ) -> any  -- New status effect
```

## `luna.debugbridge` {#debugbridge}

> Registers the `luna.debugbridge.*` TCP debug server API.
>
> Embeds a JSON-over-TCP server (127.0.0.1 only) inside the running game.
> External tools (VS Code extension, MCP server) connect to inspect and
> control the game at runtime. Network I/O runs on a background thread;
> Lua-dependent methods are queued and dispatched via `poll()` on the main thread.

```lua
luna.debugbridge.broadcast( event : string, json_data : string )  -- Broadcasts a JSON event to all connected clients
luna.debugbridge.capturePrint( msg : string, source : string?, line : integer? )  -- Captures a print message and broadcasts it to connected clients
luna.debugbridge.clearPrintHistory()  -- Clears the print history
luna.debugbridge.getClientCount() -> any  -- Returns the number of connected TCP clients
luna.debugbridge.getPerformance() -> table  -- Returns performance statistics
luna.debugbridge.getPort() -> any  -- Returns the server port (0 if not running)
luna.debugbridge.getPrintHistory( count : integer? ) -> table  -- Returns the print history
luna.debugbridge.isRunning() -> any  -- Returns whether the server is currently running
luna.debugbridge.isScreenshotRequested() -> any  -- Returns whether a screenshot is currently requested
luna.debugbridge.poll() -> any  -- Poll for pending Lua-dependent requests from TCP clients
luna.debugbridge.recordFrame( dt : number )  -- Records a frame time sample
luna.debugbridge.requestScreenshot( scale : integer? )  -- Flags a screenshot request for the next frame
luna.debugbridge.setMaxPrintHistory( max : integer )  -- Sets the maximum print history size
luna.debugbridge.start( port : u16? ) -> boolean  -- Start the TCP debug server on 127.0.0.1:port
luna.debugbridge.stop()  -- Stop the TCP debug server and close all connections
```

---

## `luna.docs` {#docs}

> Registers the `luna.docs.*` documentation management API.
>
> Provides engine-integrated documentation management: scanning runtime bindings,
> loading TOML doc catalogs, validating completeness, computing quality metrics,
> and exporting structured data for VS Code extension IntelliSense.

```lua
luna.docs.checkStaleness( catalog_ud : userdata, source_dir : string ) -> table  -- Compare catalog timestamps against source files
luna.docs.coverage( catalog_ud : userdata? ) -> any  -- Coverage: (documented, total)
luna.docs.coverageModule( module_name : string, catalog_ud : userdata? ) -> any  -- Module-level coverage
luna.docs.describe( qualified_name : string, description : string )  -- Inject a description for an API entry
luna.docs.exportAll( catalog_ud : userdata, output_dir : string )  -- Export all three files to a directory
luna.docs.exportCheatsheet( catalog_ud : userdata, path : string )  -- Export one-line-per-function cheatsheet
luna.docs.exportCompletions( catalog_ud : userdata, path : string )  -- Export completions JSON for VS Code IntelliSense
luna.docs.exportHover( catalog_ud : userdata, path : string )  -- Export hover JSON
luna.docs.exportMarkdown( catalog_ud : userdata, path : string )  -- Export markdown API reference
luna.docs.exportSignatures( catalog_ud : userdata, path : string )  -- Export signatures JSON
luna.docs.getCatalog()  -- Get the current internal catalog
luna.docs.loadAll( directory : string ) -> any  -- Load all .toml files in a directory and merge
luna.docs.loadToml( path : string ) -> any  -- Load a TOML doc file into an ApiCatalog
luna.docs.quality( catalog_ud : userdata? ) -> any  -- Calculate quality metrics for a catalog
luna.docs.qualityModule( module_name : string, catalog_ud : userdata? ) -> any  -- Quality for a single module
luna.docs.resetCatalog()  -- Reset the internal catalog
luna.docs.scan( opts : table? ) -> any  -- Scan the luna.* namespace to build an API catalog from live bindings
luna.docs.scanModule( module_name : string ) -> any  -- Scan a single module's bindings
luna.docs.setParamInfo( qualified_name : string, params : table )  -- Set parameter info for an entry
luna.docs.setReturnInfo( qualified_name : string, returns : table )  -- Set return type info for an entry
luna.docs.validate( catalog_ud : userdata? ) -> any  -- Validate catalog completeness against live bindings
luna.docs.validateModule( module_name : string, catalog_ud : userdata? ) -> any  -- Validate a single module
```

## `luna.patterns` {#patterns}

> Registers the `luna.patterns.*` software design patterns API.
>
> Provides factory functions and UserData wrappers for reusable patterns:
> EventBus (prioritized pub-sub), ObjectPool (object reuse), CommandStack
> (undo/redo), ServiceLocator (DI container), Factory (named constructors),
> and SimpleState (finite state machine).

```lua
luna.patterns.newCommandStack() -> any  -- New command stack
luna.patterns.newEventBus() -> any  -- New event bus
luna.patterns.newFactory() -> any  -- New factory
luna.patterns.newObjectPool() -> any  -- New object pool
luna.patterns.newServiceLocator() -> any  -- New service locator
luna.patterns.newSimpleState() -> any  -- New simple state
```

### `CommandStack`

```lua
CommandStack:canRedo() -> integer  -- Returns `true` if redo
CommandStack:canUndo() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if undo
CommandStack:clearAll()  -- Clear all on this CommandStack
CommandStack:execute( name : string, exec_fn : function, undo_fn : function? )  -- Execute on this CommandStack
CommandStack:getCurrentName()  -- Returns the current name
CommandStack:getHistorySize() -> integer  -- Returns the history size
CommandStack:redo() -> boolean  -- Redo on this CommandStack
CommandStack:undo() -> boolean  -- Undo on this CommandStack
```

### `EventBus`

```lua
EventBus:clear( event : string )  -- Removes all entries
EventBus:clearAll()  -- Clear all on this EventBus
EventBus:emit( args : MultiValue )  -- Emits an event
EventBus:getEvents() -> any  -- Returns the events
EventBus:getListenerCount( event : string ) -> any  -- Returns the listener count
EventBus:off( id : integer )  -- Removes a previously registered event listener
EventBus:on( event : string, callback : function, priority : integer? ) -> any  -- Registers an event listener callback
```

### `Factory`

```lua
Factory:clearAll()  -- Clear all on this Factory
Factory:create( args : MultiValue )  -- Creates a new Factory instance
Factory:getTypes() -> any  -- Returns the types
Factory:has( type_name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if the condition is met
Factory:register( type_name : string, ctor : function )  -- Adds an entry to the collection
Factory:remove( type_name : string )  -- Removes the entry from the collection
```

### `ObjectPool`

```lua
ObjectPool:acquire() -> any  -- Acquire on this ObjectPool
ObjectPool:add( value : any )  -- Adds an entry to the collection
ObjectPool:clearAll()  -- Clear all on this ObjectPool
ObjectPool:getActiveCount() -> any  -- Returns the active count
ObjectPool:getAvailableCount() -> integer  -- Returns the available count
ObjectPool:getTotalCount() -> integer  -- Returns the total count
ObjectPool:release( value : any )  -- Releases the underlying resource handle
```

### `ServiceLocator`

```lua
ServiceLocator:clearAll()  -- Clear all on this ServiceLocator
ServiceLocator:getServices() -> any  -- Returns the services
ServiceLocator:has( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if the condition is met
ServiceLocator:locate( name : string ) -> any  -- Locate on this ServiceLocator
ServiceLocator:provide( name : string, value : any )  -- Provide on this ServiceLocator
ServiceLocator:remove( name : string )  -- Removes the entry from the collection
```

### `SimpleState`

```lua
SimpleState:addState( name : string, callbacks : table? )  -- Adds state to the collection
SimpleState:clearAll()  -- Clear all on this SimpleState
SimpleState:getCurrent() -> any  -- Returns the current
SimpleState:getStates() -> any  -- Returns the states
SimpleState:hasState( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if state
SimpleState:transitionTo( name : string ) -> boolean  -- Transition to on this SimpleState
SimpleState:update( dt : number )  -- Advances the simulation by `dt` seconds
```
