## `luna.quest` {#quest}

> Lua API bindings for `luna.quest.*`.
>
> Exposes quest creation, stage management, objective tracking, and journal
> entries through the `luna.quest` table.

```lua
luna.quest.newObjective( id : string, desc : string, required : integer ) -> any  -- New objective
luna.quest.newQuest( id : string, title : string? ) -> any  -- New quest
luna.quest.newQuestLog() -> any  -- New quest log
luna.quest.newStage( id : string, name : string ) -> any  -- New stage
```

### `Objective`

```lua
Objective:addTag( tag : string )  -- Adds tag to the collection
Objective:advance( amount : integer ) -> any  -- Advances to the next item
Objective:getCurrent() -> any  -- Returns the current
Objective:getDescription() -> any  -- Returns the description
Objective:getId() -> any  -- Returns the id
Objective:getRequired() -> any  -- Returns the required
Objective:getStatus() -> any  -- Returns the status
Objective:getTags() -> any  -- Returns the tags
Objective:hasTag( tag : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if tag
Objective:isComplete() -> any  -- Returns `true` if complete
Objective:isMandatory() -> any  -- Returns `true` if mandatory
Objective:isVisible() -> any  -- Returns `true` if visible
Objective:setDescription( desc : string )  -- Sets the description
Objective:setMandatory( v : boolean )  -- Sets the mandatory
Objective:setProgress( value : integer )  -- Sets the progress
Objective:setStatus( s : string )  -- Sets the status
Objective:setVisible( v : boolean )  -- Sets the visible
```

### `Quest`

```lua
Quest:addJournalEntry( text : string, tag : string? ) -> any  -- Adds journal entry to the collection
Quest:addObjective( id : string, description : string, required : integer )  -- Adds an objective directly (creates a default stage if none exists)
Quest:addStage( stage : QuestStage )  -- Adds stage to the collection
Quest:advanceObjective( id : string, amount : integer ) -> any  -- Advance objective on this Quest
Quest:allObjectivesComplete() -> any  -- All objectives complete on this Quest
Quest:complete()  -- Marks the current task as complete
Quest:completionPercent() -> any  -- Returns the completion percentage (0.0–100.0) based on mandatory objectives
Quest:fail()  -- Marks the current task as failed
Quest:getActiveObjectiveIds() -> any  -- Returns the IDs of all Active objectives across all stages
Quest:getCurrentStage() -> any  -- Returns the current stage
Quest:getCurrentStageIndex() -> any  -- Returns the current stage index
Quest:getDescription() -> any  -- Returns the description
Quest:getId() -> any  -- Returns the id
Quest:getJournal() -> any  -- Returns the journal
Quest:getMeta( key : string ) -> any  -- Returns the meta
Quest:getReward() -> any  -- Returns the reward
Quest:getStage( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns the stage
Quest:getStageCount() -> integer  -- Returns the stage count
Quest:getStageIds() -> any  -- Returns the stage ids
Quest:getStatus() -> any  -- Returns the status
Quest:getTitle() -> any  -- Returns the title
Quest:gotoStage( id : string ) -> any  -- Goto stage on this Quest
Quest:isVisible() -> any  -- Returns `true` if visible
Quest:nextStage() -> any  -- Next stage on this Quest
Quest:resetObjective( id : string ) -> any  -- Resets an objective back to Active. Returns `true` if found
Quest:setDescription( d : string )  -- Sets the description
Quest:setMeta( key : string, value : string )  -- Sets the meta
Quest:setObjectiveStatus( id : string, s : string ) -> any  -- Sets the objective status
Quest:setReward( r : string )  -- Sets the reward
Quest:setStatus( s : string )  -- Sets the status
Quest:setTitle( t : string )  -- Sets the title
Quest:setVisible( v : boolean )  -- Sets the visible
Quest:start()  -- Begins execution
```

### `QuestLog`

```lua
QuestLog:addQuest( quest : Quest )  -- Adds quest to the collection
QuestLog:advanceObjective( quest_id : string, obj_id : string, amount : integer ) -> any  -- Advance objective on this QuestLog
QuestLog:completeQuest( id : string ) -> any  -- Complete quest on this QuestLog
QuestLog:failQuest( id : string ) -> any  -- Fail quest on this QuestLog
QuestLog:getActiveQuestIds() -> any  -- Returns the active quest ids
QuestLog:getCompletedQuestIds() -> any  -- Returns the completed quest ids
QuestLog:getFailedQuestIds() -> any  -- Returns the failed quest ids
QuestLog:getQuest( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns the quest
QuestLog:getQuestCount() -> any  -- Returns the quest count
QuestLog:getQuestIds() -> any  -- Returns the quest ids
QuestLog:getQuestsWithStatus( status : string ) -> any  -- Returns the quests with status
QuestLog:removeQuest( id : string ) -> any  -- Removes quest from the collection
QuestLog:startQuest( id : string ) -> any  -- Start quest on this QuestLog
```

### `QuestStage`

```lua
QuestStage:addObjective( obj : Objective )  -- Adds objective to the collection
QuestStage:getId() -> any  -- Returns the id
QuestStage:getName() -> any  -- Returns the name
QuestStage:getObjective( id : string ) -> any  -- Returns the objective
QuestStage:getObjectiveCount() -> integer  -- Returns the objective count
QuestStage:getObjectiveIds() -> any  -- Returns the objective ids
QuestStage:isComplete() -> any  -- Returns `true` if complete
QuestStage:setName( name : string )  -- Sets the name
```

## `luna.automation` {#automation}

> Automation Api implementation for the `lua_api` subsystem.
>
> Registers the `luna.simulator.*` namespace for automated input simulation
> via timed step scripts. Scripts inject synthetic input events into the
> engine's event queue during playback.

```lua
luna.automation.getCurrentScript()
luna.automation.getCurrentStep()
luna.automation.getElapsedTime()
luna.automation.getScripts()
luna.automation.getStepCount()
luna.automation.hasScript()
luna.automation.isComplete()
luna.automation.isPaused()
luna.automation.isRunning()
luna.automation.load()
luna.automation.pause()
luna.automation.resume()
luna.automation.start()
luna.automation.stop()
luna.automation.unload()
luna.automation.update()
```

## `luna.economy` {#economy}

> Lua API bindings for the `luna.economy.*` named resource economy module.
>
> Provides `ResourceManager` UserData for managing named resources with
> capacity, flow rates, decay, interest, conversions, and overflow policies.

```lua
luna.economy.newManager() -> any  -- New manager
```

### `ResourceManager`

```lua
ResourceManager:add( name : string, amount : number ) -> any  -- Adds an entry to the collection
ResourceManager:canAfford( name : string, amount : number ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if afford
ResourceManager:canAffordAll( tbl : table ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if afford all
ResourceManager:getAvailable( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the available
ResourceManager:getCapacity( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the capacity
ResourceManager:getDecayPercent( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the decay percent
ResourceManager:getDecayRate( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the decay rate
ResourceManager:getFlowRate( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the flow rate
ResourceManager:getGroup( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the group
ResourceManager:getInterestRate( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the interest rate
ResourceManager:getMinimum( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the minimum
ResourceManager:getNetRate( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the net rate
ResourceManager:getOverflow( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the overflow
ResourceManager:getPercent( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the percent
ResourceManager:getReserved( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the reserved
ResourceManager:getResourceNames() -> table  -- Returns the resource names
ResourceManager:getUpkeep( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the upkeep
ResourceManager:getValue( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns the value
ResourceManager:hasResource( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if resource
ResourceManager:isEmpty( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if empty
ResourceManager:isEnabled( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if enabled
ResourceManager:isFull( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if full
ResourceManager:isLocked( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if locked
ResourceManager:isVisible( name : string ) -> any  -- Returns `true` if visible
ResourceManager:newResource( name : string, capacity : number )  -- Creates a new resource instance
ResourceManager:removeResource( name : string )  -- Removes resource from the collection
ResourceManager:reserve( name : string, amount : number )  -- Reserve on this ResourceManager
ResourceManager:reset()  -- Resets state to initial values
ResourceManager:setCapacity( name : string, cap : number )  -- Sets the capacity
ResourceManager:setDecayPercent( name : string, pct : number )  -- Sets the decay percent
ResourceManager:setDecayRate( name : string, rate : number )  -- Sets the decay rate
ResourceManager:setEnabled( name : string, v : boolean )  -- Sets the enabled
ResourceManager:setFlowRate( name : string, rate : number )  -- Sets the flow rate
ResourceManager:setGroup( name : string, group : string )  -- Sets the group
ResourceManager:setInterestRate( name : string, rate : number )  -- Sets the interest rate
ResourceManager:setLocked( name : string, v : boolean )  -- Sets the locked
ResourceManager:setMinimum( name : string, min : number )  -- Sets the minimum
ResourceManager:setUpkeep( name : string, upkeep : number )  -- Sets the upkeep
ResourceManager:setValue( name : string, value : number )  -- Sets the value
ResourceManager:setVisible( name : string, v : boolean )  -- Sets the visible
ResourceManager:spend( name : string, amount : number ) -> any  -- Spend on this ResourceManager
ResourceManager:spendAll( tbl : table ) -> any  -- Spend all on this ResourceManager
ResourceManager:tick( dt : number )  -- Advances internal state by one logic tick
ResourceManager:totalByGroup( group : string ) -> any  -- Total by group on this ResourceManager
ResourceManager:turn()  -- Turn on this ResourceManager
ResourceManager:unreserve( name : string, amount : number )  -- Unreserve on this ResourceManager
```

---

## `luna.font` {#font}

> Lua API bindings for the `luna.font.*` font rasterizer module.
>
> Provides `newRasterizer`, `newTrueTypeRasterizer`, `newBMFontRasterizer`,
> and `newGlyphData` factory functions matching the LÖVE2D `love.font` module
> surface.  Font loading delegates to the same `Font::from_bytes` path used by
> `luna.graphics.newFont` so the returned `LuaFont` userdata is fully
> compatible with all existing graphics API functions.

```lua
luna.font.newBMFontRasterizer()  -- Stub: BMFont rasterization is not yet supported
luna.font.newGlyphData()  -- Returns glyph metrics for a given Unicode code point within the font
luna.font.newRasterizer()  -- Loads a TTF/OTF font file and returns a font userdata object
luna.font.newTrueTypeRasterizer()  -- Loads a TTF/OTF font with an optional hinting hint (currently ignored)
```

### `GlyphData`

```lua
GlyphData:getAdvance() -> number  -- Returns the horizontal advance width in pixels
GlyphData:getBearingX() -> number  -- Returns the horizontal bearing (cursor-to-glyph-edge offset)
GlyphData:getBearingY() -> number  -- Returns the vertical bearing (baseline-to-glyph-top offset)
GlyphData:getGlyph() -> integer  -- Returns the Unicode code point as an integer
GlyphData:getGlyphString() -> string  -- Returns the glyph character as a UTF-8 string
GlyphData:getHeight() -> integer  -- Returns the pixel height of the glyph bitmap
GlyphData:getWidth() -> integer  -- Returns the pixel width of the glyph bitmap
```

---

## `luna.overlay` {#overlay}

> Lua API bindings for the `luna.overlay.*` screen-effect overlay module.
>
> Registers the `luna.overlay` table and exposes a single factory:

```lua
luna.overlay.newOverlay()
```

### `Overlay`

```lua
Overlay:clear()  -- Resets all overlay subsystems to their inactive defaults
Overlay:draw()  -- Placeholder for draw — actual rendering handled by the game loop
Overlay:getAmbientColor() -> number  -- Returns the current ambient tint colour as `(r, g, b, a)`
Overlay:getCloudCount() -> number  -- Returns the current cloud shadow blob count
Overlay:getCloudOpacity() -> number  -- Returns the cloud shadow opacity (0.0–1.0)
Overlay:getCloudScale() -> number  -- Returns the cloud shadow blob size scale
Overlay:getCloudSpeed() -> number  -- Returns the cloud shadow scroll speed in pixels per second
Overlay:getDimensions() -> number  -- Returns both canvas dimensions as `(width, height)`
Overlay:getFilmGrainIntensity() -> number  -- Returns the current film grain noise amplitude (0.0–1.0)
Overlay:getFogColor() -> number  -- Returns the current fog colour as `(r, g, b, a)`
Overlay:getFogDensity() -> number  -- Returns the current fog density (0.0–1.0)
Overlay:getHeatHazeIntensity() -> number  -- Returns the heat haze distortion intensity
Overlay:getHeight() -> number  -- Returns the overlay canvas height in pixels
Overlay:getLightningColor() -> number  -- Returns the current lightning flash colour as `(r, g, b, a)`
Overlay:getShakeOffset() -> number  -- Returns the current camera-shake pixel offset as `(x, y)`
Overlay:getTimeOfDay() -> number  -- Returns the current time-of-day value (0.0–24.0)
Overlay:getVignetteStrength() -> number  -- Returns the current vignette darkening strength (0.0–1.0)
Overlay:getWeather() -> string  -- Returns the current weather type as a lowercase string name
Overlay:getWeatherIntensity() -> number  -- Returns the weather particle density (0.0–1.0)
Overlay:getWidth() -> number  -- Returns the overlay canvas width in pixels
Overlay:getWindDirection() -> number  -- Returns the wind direction in radians
Overlay:getWindSpeed() -> number  -- Returns the wind speed in pixels per second
Overlay:isActive() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if any overlay subsystem is currently active
Overlay:isAmbientEnabled() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if automatic ambient colour cycling is enabled
Overlay:isCloudShadowsEnabled() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if the cloud shadow overlay is enabled
Overlay:isFading() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` while a fade transition is in progress
Overlay:isFilmGrainEnabled() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if film grain noise is enabled
Overlay:isFlashing() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` while a flash is fading out
Overlay:isFogEnabled() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if the atmospheric fog overlay is enabled
Overlay:isHeatHazeEnabled() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if heat haze distortion is enabled
Overlay:isShaking() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` while a camera shake is in progress
Overlay:isVignetteEnabled() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if the vignette overlay is enabled
Overlay:isWeatherEnabled() -> boolean  -- Returns `true` if the weather particle spawner is enabled
Overlay:resize( width : number, height : number )  -- Updates the internal canvas dimensions on window resize
Overlay:setAmbientEnabled( enabled : boolean )  -- Enables or disables automatic time-of-day ambient colour cycling
Overlay:setCloudCount( count : number )  -- Sets the number of cloud shadow blobs rendered each frame
Overlay:setCloudOpacity( opacity : number )  -- Sets the cloud shadow overlay opacity (0.0 = invisible, 1.0 = fully dark)
Overlay:setCloudScale( scale : number )  -- Sets the relative size scale of each cloud shadow blob
Overlay:setCloudShadows( enabled : boolean )  -- Enables or disables the scrolling cloud shadow overlay
Overlay:setCloudSpeed( speed : number )  -- Sets the horizontal scroll speed of cloud shadows in pixels per second
Overlay:setFilmGrainEnabled( enabled : boolean )  -- Enables or disables per-frame random film grain noise
Overlay:setFilmGrainIntensity( intensity : number )  -- Sets the film grain noise amplitude (0.0–1.0)
Overlay:setFogDensity( density : number )  -- Sets the fog density (0.0 = invisible, 1.0 = fully opaque)
Overlay:setFogEnabled( enabled : boolean )  -- Enables or disables atmospheric fog
Overlay:setHeatHazeEnabled( enabled : boolean )  -- Enables or disables UV-distortion heat shimmer
Overlay:setHeatHazeIntensity( intensity : number )  -- Sets the heat haze distortion intensity
Overlay:setTimeOfDay( hour : number )  -- Sets the time-of-day value that drives ambient colour cycling
Overlay:setVignetteEnabled( enabled : boolean )  -- Enables or disables screen-edge darkening (vignette)
Overlay:setVignetteStrength( strength : number )  -- Sets the vignette darkening strength (0.0–1.0)
Overlay:setWeather( weather_type : string )  -- Sets the active weather type by name
Overlay:setWeatherEnabled( enabled : boolean )  -- Enables or disables the weather particle spawner
Overlay:setWeatherIntensity( intensity : number )  -- Sets the weather particle density
Overlay:setWindDirection( angle : number )  -- Sets the wind direction as an angle in radians
Overlay:setWindSpeed( speed : number )  -- Sets the wind speed in pixels per second
Overlay:triggerLightning()  -- Triggers a one-shot lightning flash
Overlay:update( dt : number )  -- Advances all active overlay subsystems by `dt` seconds
```

## `luna.sprite` {#sprite}

> Registers the `luna.sprite.*` sprite system API (SpriteBatch, NineSlice, Camera, Animation)..
>
> Provides UserData wrappers and factory functions for extended graphics
> subsystems: Light2D, TextureAtlas, DrawLayer, Viewport, ViewportScale,
> SpriteSheet, PolygonMap, GraphRenderer, LargeMapRenderer, ColumnBatch,
> Camera2D, Animation, Trail, DecalSurface, and PaletteLUT.

```lua
luna.sprite.newAnimation() -> any  -- New animation
luna.sprite.newCamera2D( w : number?, h : number? ) -> any  -- New camera2d
luna.sprite.newColumnBatch( col_count : integer, screen_w : number, screen_h : number ) -> any  -- New column batch
luna.sprite.newDrawLayer() -> any  -- New draw layer
luna.sprite.newGraphRenderer() -> any  -- New graph renderer
luna.sprite.newLargeMapRenderer( tile_w : integer, tile_h : integer ) -> any  -- New large map renderer
luna.sprite.newLight2D( x : number, y : number, radius : number ) -> any  -- New light2d
luna.sprite.newPolygonMap() -> any  -- New polygon map
luna.sprite.newSpriteSheet( tex_w : integer, tex_h : integer, frame_w : integer, frame_h : integer ) -> any  -- New sprite sheet
luna.sprite.newTextureAtlas( w : integer, h : integer, padding : integer? ) -> any  -- New texture atlas
luna.sprite.newViewport( w : number, h : number, mode : string? ) -> any  -- New viewport
luna.sprite.newViewportScale( w : number, h : number, mode : string? ) -> any  -- New viewport scale
```
